chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application No.D-52 of 2023 (The State through P.G Sindh Vs. Piryar Ali and another) Date of hearing Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 01-02-2024 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. ********* At the very outset, it is stated by learned Deputy Prosecutor General for the State that the order whereby individual trial of the cases committed during course of same transaction has been reviewed by the Supreme Court itself, therefore, he would not press the disposal of instant revision application before this Court on merits provided the State is permitted to make fresh application before learned trial Court for the purpose to be disposed of afresh in terms of order passed by the Supreme Court in Review. Order accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E ARBROHI
